stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 6/26 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃航空與傳產，避險兼卡位

stocks.description: 肖年仔，外資狂掃 5.2 萬張華航，這擺明是看好暑假旺季題材，準備拉高出貨給散戶接刀。這不是真外資長線佈局，是短線炒作的訊號啦！
外資敲進 3.9 萬張台塑，傳產龍頭股，在大盤震盪時，外資把資金轉進這種低波動的權值股，當作資金避風港，穩穩賺，但別期待噴出。
外資買超 2.3 萬張合庫金，金融股是外資在避險時的愛股，殖利率高、波動小，進可攻退可守，但投信卻在賣部分金融，有點對作，肖年仔要看清楚。
外資也買進 1.3 萬張長榮航，跟華航一樣，航空雙雄一起被外資鎖定，旺季題材發酵，但也要小心高檔倒貨，別當最後一隻老鼠。
外資買超 1.1 萬張聯電，但投信卻大賣 2.6 萬張，自營商小買，這檔外資跟投信在對作，主力意圖不明，肖年仔們風險較高，別黑白買。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳行情啟動，鎖定金融與記憶體

stocks.description: 投信狂敲 3.7 萬張華邦電，記憶體族群最近有題材，投信這是在作帳，準備拉抬衝績效，肖年仔們可以觀察，但別傻傻追高被割韭菜。
投信買超 3.2 萬張兆豐金，永豐金、華南金、玉山金、第一金也都在買超榜上，投信這波是集體鎖定金融股，準備年底作帳，跟外資在部分金融股上對作，這就是法人之間的心理戰。
投信買超 3.0 萬張永豐金，金融股是投信作帳的常客，穩健好拉，但外資卻在賣玉山金、兆豐金，這盤面很複雜，別亂猜。
投信買超 1.5 萬張南亞科，跟華邦電一樣，記憶體雙雄都被投信看上，這波作帳行情，記憶體是重點之一，但也要小心投信結帳倒貨。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：短線操作，面板與聯電成焦點

stocks.description: 自營商買超 4,086 張聯電，外資買投信賣，自營商這小咖也來湊熱鬧，可能是避險盤或短線套利，意圖不明，肖年仔們別亂跟。
自營商買超 3,084 張三商壽，壽險股有時會被自營商當作避險標的，或是看好特定題材，但量不大，參考就好，別太認真。
自營商買超 2,367 張群創，面板股最近有轉機題材，自營商這是在卡位，看能不能搭上順風車，但肖年仔們要小心，面板股波動大，接刀要小心。
自營商也買超 2,121 張華航，跟外資一起買航空股，這表示航空股的旺季題材確實吸引短線資金，但也要小心隔日沖，別被倒貨。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：高檔避險與資金避風港（金融、航空、傳產）
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔，外資在大盤高檔震盪時，把資金從部分科技股（如力積電、旺宏）撤出，轉進波動較小、殖利率較高的金融股（合庫金、臺企銀、彰銀、元大金）以及具旺季題材的航空股（華航、長榮航）。同時，傳產龍頭股（台塑、台泥、台玻）也成為資金避風港，顯示外資在尋求穩健收益，降低整體投資組合風險。這不是看壞大盤，而是資金輪動的避險操作，肖年仔們要學會看懂這種避險盤。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：投信作帳行情啟動（金融、記憶體）
strategies.strategy_content: 本土投信大戶展現強烈作帳意圖，大舉買進金融股（兆豐金、永豐金、華南金、玉山金、第一金）和記憶體族群（華邦電、南亞科）。金融股因其穩定性與高殖利率，常是投信年底衝刺績效的標的。記憶體則因產業景氣有望復甦，成為投信提前卡位的重點。這波操作顯示投信在為季底或年底結帳做準備，肖年仔們要留意這些被鎖碼的標的，但別傻傻追高。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：法人對作與短線套利（聯電、部分金融）
strategies.strategy_content: 聯電出現外資買、投信大賣的法人對作現象，自營商則小幅買進。這顯示市場對聯電的看法分歧，外資可能看好其成熟製程的穩定性，而投信則可能在調整持股或獲利了結。此外，外資賣超玉山金、兆豐金、永豐金、華南金，但投信卻大買這些金融股，這也是典型的法人對作。這種情況下，股價容易震盪，短線主力會趁機套利，肖年仔們要小心別被洗出場，更別去接這種刀。

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，看清楚了沒？外資在避險，把錢往航空跟傳產、部分金融塞，投信這群本土國家隊則在作帳，狂掃金融跟記憶體。法人對作的股票，別傻傻去接刀，小心被割韭菜！這盤面就是資金輪動，高檔震盪，穩健為上！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 這外資大咖狂掃華航，擺明就是看好航空雙雄的暑假旺季題材，準備拉高出貨給散戶接刀，這不是真外資長線佈局，是短線炒作的訊號啦！
凱基台北這分點，肖年仔們都知道是隔日沖大本營。今天買聯電，明天八成就是準備倒貨給追高的韭菜，小心別去接刀啊！
元大投信這本土國家隊，狂敲華邦電，擺明就是投信作帳行情又來了。記憶體族群最近有題材，他們趁機拉抬，準備年底結帳衝績效。
摩根大通這外資大咖，狂倒力積電，跟外資整體賣超力積電的動作一致。這擺明是外資在撤出部分半導體資金，肖年仔們別傻傻去接這種倒貨盤。

english_professor_news.title: 3 Stocks I'm Not Selling No Matter What the Market Does

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

The stock market hasn't endured a deep bear market since the Great Recession. There have been corrections and bear markets since that point, but they have been brief affairs. With the market near all-time highs, an intense investor focus on a small number of tech giants, inflation fears, recession fears, and geopolitical conflicts raging, I'm expecting another deep bear market in the near future. Here are three reliable dividend stocks that I'll hold right through the downturn.

Over time, my investment approach has shifted toward more conservative investments. I prefer to own companies that I believe are well run, buying them when they are attractively priced relative to historical levels. In practice, that usually means buying companies like Medtronic (NYSE: MDT), which have long histories of annual dividend increases and historically high yields. Medtronic's dividend streak is up to 49 years, and its 3.5% yield is toward the high end of the stock's historical yield range.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Medtronic is a large medical device company. Over time, it got bloated, and inefficiencies crept in. Profitability sagged and growth slowed. Management has been working to slim down and refocus the company. It is starting to gain some traction, noting that it just reported its highest annual revenue growth in a decade.

There's still more work to be done, but the healthcare products it sells are necessities, and I'm not about to give up on the stock if there's a market downturn. When the next bear market turns into a bull market, Medtronic will still be the same well-run company and, I believe, will continue to reliably increase its dividend all along the way.

Real estate investment trust (REIT) Realty Income (NYSE: O) has an attractive dividend yield of 5.2%. It has increased its dividend annually for 31 years. I owned it once, sold it short-sightedly, and then ended up owning it again when it bought another REIT I owned. I won't be selling it again anytime soon. The yield isn't historically high, but it is attractive on an absolute basis.

Realty Income is the largest net lease REIT, with over 15,500 properties. It focuses on single-tenant retail assets but also has exposure to industrial properties and to more unique assets, such as casinos and data centers. Geographically, Realty Income's portfolio spans North America and Europe. A conservative management approach is taken throughout the company's operations. To sum it up, the REIT is boring and reliable, as evidenced by the fact that occupancy didn't drop below 96% during the Great Recession. Given the depth of that economic downturn and the associated bear market, I'm confident that holding Realty Income through the next bear market is a good call.

level2_keywords.meaning: 熊市，指股票市場長期下跌的趨勢，通常伴隨悲觀情緒，投資人信心低落。
level2_keywords.example: 「Many investors are preparing for a potential bear market by shifting to more defensive assets.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 股息股，指那些定期向股東支付股息的公司股票，通常被視為較穩定的投資標的。
level2_keywords.example: 「For long-term income, many retirees prefer to invest in reliable dividend stocks.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 經濟衰退，指一個國家或地區的經濟活動連續兩個季度出現負成長，通常伴隨失業率上升和消費支出減少。
level2_keywords.example: 「Governments often implement fiscal stimulus measures to combat a looming recession.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 不動產投資信託 (Real Estate Investment Trust)，是一種投資於房地產的信託基金，讓投資人可以透過購買股票的方式間接投資大型不動產組合，並享有租金收益。
level2_keywords.example: 「Investing in REITs can provide a steady stream of income through rental properties without direct ownership.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 殖利率，在股票或債券投資中，指投資所產生的收益與其成本之間的比率，常用來衡量投資報酬率。
level2_keywords.example: 「The bond's high yield attracted many investors seeking stable returns.」

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這篇新聞主要在探討當前市場可能面臨深度『熊市』的背景下，投資人應該如何佈局。文章作者認為，在市場接近歷史高點、科技股過熱、通膨與經濟衰退擔憂以及地緣政治衝突不斷的環境下，未來很可能出現一次顯著的市場修正。因此，他建議投資人轉向更保守、更具防禦性的資產，特別是那些能穩定派發股息的公司，以及『不動產投資信託』（REITs）。文章中提到的美敦力（Medtronic）和 Realty Income 就是這類型的代表，它們都以長期穩定的股息增長和在經濟下行時的韌性著稱。這反映了在不確定性高的市場環境中，許多投資人會尋求『避險』或『抗跌』的策略，以保護資產並維持現金流。

level3_translation.sentence: The stock market hasn't endured a deep bear market since the Great Recession.
level3_translation.translation: 自從『全球金融海嘯』以來，股市還沒有經歷過一次深度『熊市』。

level3_translation.sentence: There have been corrections and bear markets since that point, but they have been brief affairs.
level3_translation.translation: 從那時起，雖然有過修正和熊市，但它們都只是短暫的現象。

level3_translation.sentence: With the market near all-time highs, an intense investor focus on a small number of tech giants, inflation fears, recession fears, and geopolitical conflicts raging, I'm expecting another deep bear market in the near future.
level3_translation.translation: 考量到目前市場接近歷史高點、投資人過度集中關注少數科技巨頭、通膨擔憂、經濟衰退疑慮以及地緣政治衝突不斷，我預期在不久的將來會出現另一次深度熊市。

level3_translation.sentence: Here are three reliable dividend stocks that I'll hold right through the downturn.
level3_translation.translation: 以下是三檔我會抱牢、度過市場低迷期的可靠『股息股』。

level3_translation.sentence: Over time, my investment approach has shifted toward more conservative investments.
level3_translation.translation: 隨著時間推移，我的投資策略已轉向更保守的投資。

level3_translation.sentence: I prefer to own companies that I believe are well run, buying them when they are attractively priced relative to historical levels.
level3_translation.translation: 我偏好持有那些我認為經營良好、且相對於歷史水準價格具吸引力的公司。

level3_translation.sentence: In practice, that usually means buying companies like Medtronic (NYSE: MDT), which have long histories of annual dividend increases and historically high yields.
level3_translation.translation: 實際上，這通常意味著買入像 Medtronic (美敦力，紐約證交所代碼：MDT) 這樣的公司，它們擁有長期每年增加股息的歷史，以及歷史上較高的『殖利率』。

level3_translation.sentence: Medtronic's dividend streak is up to 49 years, and its 3.5% yield is toward the high end of the stock's historical yield range.
level3_translation.translation: 美敦力的股息連續增長紀錄已達 49 年，其 3.5% 的『殖利率』正處於該股票歷史殖利率區間的高端。

level3_translation.sentence: Missed Nvidia in 2009?
level3_translation.translation: 錯過了 2009 年的輝達嗎？

level3_translation.sentence: This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again.
level3_translation.translation: 這個罕見的訊號又再次閃現了。

level3_translation.sentence: In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia.
level3_translation.translation: 2009 年，一個『加倍下注』的訊號曾為一家名不見經傳的晶片製造商輝達閃現。

level3_translation.sentence: For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia.
level3_translation.translation: 多年來首次，同樣的『完全確信』訊號正為一家規模僅輝達百分之一的公司閃現。

level3_translation.sentence: Continue »
level3_translation.translation: 繼續閱讀 »

level3_translation.sentence: Medtronic is a large medical device company.
level3_translation.translation: 美敦力是一家大型醫療設備公司。

level3_translation.sentence: Over time, it got bloated, and inefficiencies crept in.
level3_translation.translation: 隨著時間推移，它變得臃腫，效率低落的問題也悄然出現。

level3_translation.sentence: Profitability sagged and growth slowed.
level3_translation.translation: 『獲利能力』下滑，成長也趨緩。

level3_translation.sentence: Management has been working to slim down and refocus the company.
level3_translation.translation: 管理層一直在努力精簡並重新聚焦公司業務。

level3_translation.sentence: It is starting to gain some traction, noting that it just reported its highest annual revenue growth in a decade.
level3_translation.translation: 它正開始取得一些進展，值得注意的是，它剛公布了十年來最高的年度營收成長。

level3_translation.sentence: There's still more work to be done, but the healthcare products it sells are necessities, and I'm not about to give up on the stock if there's a market downturn.
level3_translation.translation: 雖然還有更多工作要做，但它銷售的醫療保健產品是必需品，如果市場出現低迷，我也不會放棄這檔股票。

level3_translation.sentence: When the next bear market turns into a bull market, Medtronic will still be the same well-run company and, I believe, will continue to reliably increase its dividend all along the way.
level3_translation.translation: 當下一個熊市轉為牛市時，美敦力仍將是那家經營良好的公司，而且我相信，它將會一路持續可靠地增加股息。

level3_translation.sentence: Real estate investment trust (REIT) Realty Income (NYSE: O) has an attractive dividend yield of 5.2%.
level3_translation.translation: 『不動產投資信託』(REIT) Realty Income (房地產收益公司，紐約證交所代碼：O) 擁有 5.2% 的誘人『股息殖利率』。

level3_translation.sentence: It has increased its dividend annually for 31 years.
level3_translation.translation: 它已連續 31 年每年增加股息。

level3_translation.sentence: I owned it once, sold it short-sightedly, and then ended up owning it again when it bought another REIT I owned.
level3_translation.translation: 我曾經持有過它，卻短視地賣掉了，然後當它收購了我持有的另一家 REIT 時，我又再次擁有它。

level3_translation.sentence: I won't be selling it again anytime soon.
level3_translation.translation: 我近期不會再賣掉它了。

level3_translation.sentence: The yield isn't historically high, but it is attractive on an absolute basis.
level3_translation.translation: 雖然其『殖利率』並非歷史新高，但就絕對值而言仍具吸引力。

level3_translation.sentence: Realty Income is the largest net lease REIT, with over 15,500 properties.
level3_translation.translation: Realty Income 是最大的『淨租賃型不動產投資信託』，擁有超過 15,500 處房產。

level3_translation.sentence: It focuses on single-tenant retail assets but also has exposure to industrial properties and to more unique assets, such as casinos and data centers.
level3_translation.translation: 它主要專注於單一租戶的零售資產，但也涉足工業地產和更獨特的資產，例如賭場和資料中心。

level3_translation.sentence: Geographically, Realty Income's portfolio spans North America and Europe.
level3_translation.translation: 從地理位置來看，Realty Income 的投資組合遍及北美和歐洲。

level3_translation.sentence: A conservative management approach is taken throughout the company's operations.
level3_translation.translation: 該公司在所有營運中都採取保守的管理方式。

level3_translation.sentence: To sum it up, the REIT is boring and reliable, as evidenced by the fact that occupancy didn't drop below 96% during the Great Recession.
level3_translation.translation: 總而言之，這家 REIT 既『無聊』又可靠，證據就是即使在『全球金融海嘯』期間，其『出租率』也未曾跌破 96%。

level3_translation.sentence: Given the depth of that economic downturn and the associated bear market, I'm confident that holding Realty Income through the next bear market is a good call.
level3_translation.translation: 考慮到那次經濟衰退的深度以及隨之而來的熊市，我有信心在下一個熊市中持有 Realty Income 是個明智的決定。

english_professor_news.title: Procore Technologies (PCOR) Announces Roll-out of Connected Common Data Environment

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR) is one of the Best Cloud Computing Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On June 1, the company announced the roll-out of its connected Common Data Environment. This is a purpose-built CDE from the ground up on a single platform, which can help in unifying and verifying project data from approved design to handover. This helps to capture evidence in the flow of work and keeps the digital record in line with site reality. This trusted data foundation enables the agentic AI to act throughout the full construction lifecycle.

Where fragmented information has been hampering decision-making and leading to costly delays, connected data continues to define top-performing organizations. Developed specifically for European market requirements, Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR)'s CDE will initially be rolled out in the UK and Ireland before expanding across EMEA.

The company developed a localized UK Data Zone, while a dedicated EU Data Zone is expected to be launched in the fall of 2026.

Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR) offers a cloud-based construction management platform and related products and services.

While we acknowledge the potential of PCOR as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

READ NEXT: 10 Best FMCG Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts and 11 Best Long-Term Tech Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「共通資料環境」是一種集中化的數位平台，用於管理建築或工程專案的所有資訊，確保所有參與者都能存取最新、一致的資料。
level2_keywords.example: The new CDE aims to streamline project workflows and reduce errors in construction.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「雲端運算」是一種透過網路提供運算服務（如伺服器、儲存、資料庫、網路、軟體、分析和智慧）的模式，讓使用者無需直接管理實體硬體。
level2_keywords.example: Many modern construction management platforms leverage cloud computing for scalability and accessibility.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「自主代理人工智慧」是指能夠自主感知環境、決策並執行行動以達成特定目標的人工智慧系統，通常具備學習和適應能力。
level2_keywords.example: This trusted data foundation enables the agentic AI to act throughout the full construction lifecycle.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「營建生命週期」指的是一個建築或基礎設施專案從概念規劃、設計、施工、營運維護到最終拆除的整個過程。
level2_keywords.example: Procore's platform supports data management across the entire construction lifecycle.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「碎片化資訊」指的是資料分散、不連貫、不一致的狀態，通常存在於不同的系統或部門中，導致難以整合和有效利用。
level2_keywords.example: Fragmented information often leads to delays and inefficiencies in large-scale projects.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這篇新聞主要在講 Procore 這家公司，他們專門提供營建業的雲端管理平台。這次他們推出了一個叫做『共通資料環境』（Common Data Environment, CDE）的新服務，特別是針對歐洲市場。

為什麼這很重要呢？在傳統營建業裡，專案資料常常是散落在各個團隊、各個軟體，甚至紙本文件上，這種『碎片化資訊』會導致溝通不良、決策延誤，甚至成本超支。想像一下，設計圖、施工進度、材料採購、預算等等，如果沒有一個統一的地方管理，很容易出錯。

Procore 的這個 CDE 就是要解決這個痛點。它提供一個單一的雲端平台，讓從設計、施工到驗收移交的所有專案資料都能集中管理、即時更新，而且還能確保資料的一致性和可驗證性。這樣一來，不僅能提高效率、減少錯誤，還能為未來的『自主代理人工智慧』（Agentic AI）應用打下基礎，讓 AI 能在整個營建專案生命週期中發揮更大的作用。

這也反映了全球營建業正在加速數位轉型的大趨勢，特別是在歐洲，對於資料管理和法規遵循有更高的要求。Procore 透過推出本地化的資料區，顯示他們對區域市場的重視和適應能力。這對投資人來說，代表著這類提供產業數位化解決方案的公司，在未來仍有很大的成長潛力。

level3_translation.sentence: The above button links to Coinbase.
level3_translation.translation: 「上方按鈕連結到 Coinbase。」

level3_translation.sentence: Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading.
level3_translation.translation: 「Yahoo Finance 並非證券經紀商或投資顧問，不提供證券或加密貨幣的銷售，也不協助交易。」

level3_translation.sentence: Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link.
level3_translation.translation: 「Coinbase 會針對透過此連結產生的特定活動支付費用給我們。」

level3_translation.sentence: Prices displayed are informational.
level3_translation.translation: 「顯示的價格僅供參考。」

level3_translation.sentence: Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR) is one of the Best Cloud Computing Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds.
level3_translation.translation: 「根據對沖基金的說法，Procore Technologies 公司（紐約證交所代碼：PCOR）是最佳雲端運算股票之一。」

level3_translation.sentence: On June 1, the company announced the roll-out of its connected Common Data Environment.
level3_translation.translation: 「在 6 月 1 日，該公司宣布推出其連結的『共通資料環境』（Common Data Environment）。」

level3_translation.sentence: This is a purpose-built CDE from the ground up on a single platform, which can help in unifying and verifying project data from approved design to handover.
level3_translation.translation: 「這是一個從零開始、專為特定目的打造的共通資料環境（CDE），建構在單一平台上，有助於整合並驗證從核准設計到專案移交的所有專案資料。」

level3_translation.sentence: This helps to capture evidence in the flow of work and keeps the digital record in line with site reality.
level3_translation.translation: 「這有助於在工作流程中捕捉證據，並確保數位記錄與現場實際情況保持一致。」

level3_translation.sentence: This trusted data foundation enables the agentic AI to act throughout the full construction lifecycle.
level3_translation.translation: 「這個可信賴的資料基礎，讓『自主代理人工智慧』（agentic AI）能夠在整個營建生命週期中發揮作用。」

level3_translation.sentence: Where fragmented information has been hampering decision-making and leading to costly delays, connected data continues to define top-performing organizations.
level3_translation.translation: 「在過去，碎片化的資訊一直阻礙決策並導致昂貴的延誤，而連結的資料則持續定義著表現卓越的組織。」

level3_translation.sentence: Developed specifically for European market requirements, Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR)'s CDE will initially be rolled out in the UK and Ireland before expanding across EMEA.
level3_translation.translation: 「Procore Technologies 公司（紐約證交所代碼：PCOR）的共通資料環境（CDE）是專為歐洲市場需求開發的，初期將在英國和愛爾蘭推出，隨後再擴展到整個歐洲、中東和非洲地區（EMEA）。」

level3_translation.sentence: The company developed a localized UK Data Zone, while a dedicated EU Data Zone is expected to be launched in the fall of 2026.
level3_translation.translation: 「該公司開發了一個本地化的英國資料區，而專屬的歐盟資料區預計將於 2026 年秋季推出。」

level3_translation.sentence: Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:PCOR) offers a cloud-based construction management platform and related products and services.
level3_translation.translation: 「Procore Technologies 公司（紐約證交所代碼：PCOR）提供基於雲端的營建管理平台以及相關產品與服務。」

level3_translation.sentence: While we acknowledge the potential of PCOR as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk.
level3_translation.translation: 「儘管我們認可 PCOR 作為一項投資的潛力，但我們認為某些人工智慧股票提供更大的上漲潛力，並具有較低的下行風險。」

level3_translation.sentence: If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.
level3_translation.translation: 「如果您正在尋找一支極度被低估，且有望從川普時代關稅和回流趨勢中顯著受益的人工智慧股票，請參閱我們關於最佳短期人工智慧股票的免費報告。」

level3_translation.sentence: READ NEXT: 10 Best FMCG Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts and 11 Best Long-Term Tech Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.
level3_translation.translation: 「延伸閱讀：分析師眼中最值得投資的 10 支快速消費品股票，以及分析師眼中最值得買入的 11 支長期科技股票。」

english_professor_news.title: Goldman Sachs Raises PT on Dynatrace (DT) Stock

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Dynatrace, Inc. (NYSE:DT) is one of the Best Cloud Computing Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On June 17, Goldman Sachs analyst Matthew Martino lifted the firm's price objective to $50 from $45 and maintained a "Buy" rating. There have been management discussions addressing the worries related to the slower Q4 net new annual recurring revenue growth as well as ambitious FY27 guidance. Post this, there was an improvement in the firm's confidence in Dynatrace, Inc. (NYSE:DT)'s FY 2027 outlook.

This is because the company's management highlighted that the recent softness was mainly due to Europe. The analyst further added that several drivers were also outlined, which aid the credible path to reaccelerating growth with potential upside as the year moves forward.

In a different update, BMO Capital lifted the firm's price objective on Dynatrace, Inc. (NYSE:DT)'s stock to $50 from $43 and maintained an "Outperform" rating. The analyst highlighted that the company gave a credible bridge to FY 2027 annualized recurring revenue targets.

Dynatrace, Inc. (NYSE:DT) offers a unified observability platform, which helps in combining AIOps, cloud monitoring, as well as application security.

While we acknowledge the potential of DT as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

READ NEXT: 10 Best FMCG Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts and 11 Best Long-Term Tech Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.

level2_keywords.meaning: 股價目標，指分析師或投資機構預期某支股票在未來一段時間內可能達到的價格。
level2_keywords.example: Goldman Sachs lifted the firm's `price objective` for Dynatrace, signaling a positive outlook.

level2_keywords.meaning: 買入評級，是分析師對某支股票的推薦，建議投資者購買，預期其股價將上漲。
level2_keywords.example: The analyst `maintained a "Buy" rating` on the stock, indicating strong confidence in its future performance.

level2_keywords.meaning: 年度經常性收入，指訂閱制或合約制業務每年穩定重複產生的收入，是衡量軟體服務公司成長的關鍵指標。
level2_keywords.example: Management addressed worries related to the slower Q4 net new `annual recurring revenue` growth.

level2_keywords.meaning: 財測指引，指公司管理層對未來營收、利潤等財務表現的預期或預測。
level2_keywords.example: The company's ambitious FY27 `guidance` was a key topic in investor discussions.

level2_keywords.meaning: 可觀測性平台，一種軟體工具，能讓企業監控、理解並優化其複雜的IT系統和應用程式的運行狀況。
level2_keywords.example: Dynatrace offers a unified `observability platform` combining AIOps and cloud monitoring.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這篇新聞主要在講述兩家知名的投資銀行，高盛（Goldman Sachs）和 BMO 資本市場，都對雲端軟體公司 Dynatrace (DT) 給出了非常正面的評價。他們不僅調高了這家公司的目標股價（price objective），還維持了「買入」或「優於大盤」的評級。這在財經界通常意味著分析師們對該公司未來的營運表現和成長潛力抱持更樂觀的看法。

為什麼會有這樣的轉變呢？新聞中提到，Dynatrace 的管理層成功地回應了市場對於其「年度經常性收入」（annual recurring revenue, ARR）增長放緩的擔憂，並且提出了具體的策略，讓分析師們相信公司能夠達成其在 2027 財年設定的雄心勃勃的「財測指引」（guidance）。Dynatrace 的核心業務是提供一個整合了 AIOps（人工智慧營運）、雲端監控和應用程式安全的「可觀測性平台」，這在當今企業數位轉型和雲端化的趨勢下，是非常關鍵且需求旺盛的技術。

總體來說，這類分析師報告的發布，通常會提升投資人對公司的信心，進而可能推升股價，反映市場對其在雲端運算和 AI 營運領域成長軌跡的認可。這也顯示了在科技產業中，即使面臨短期挑戰，只要公司能有效溝通其策略並展現執行力，市場依然會給予正面的回饋。

market_linker_insight.violence_connection:
今日台股大戶籌碼動向揭示了一場精密的市場資金大挪移，其背後邏輯與國際財經新聞的潛在預警不謀而合。外資大舉拋售權值股台積電及市場指標ETF元大台灣50，同時大量買入力積電、華航、長榮航等傳產與記憶體股，這並非單純的獲利了結，更像是一場對未來市場情勢的「預先部署」。

摩根大通巨量賣出0050，與美商高盛狂掃力積電的兩極操作，恰好呼應了國際新聞中對「深度熊市」的預期與對「可靠股」的強調。外資可能正從高估值的AI/科技巨頭（如台積電所代表的先進製程）中抽離資金，轉向被低估或具備防禦性質的傳統產業（航空、塑化、鋼鐵）以及特定利基型半導體（如力積電的特殊記憶體與邏輯代工）。這顯示大戶們可能已提前掌握了全球經濟放緩或科技股估值修正的訊號，正進行風險規避與資產重配置。

值得注意的是，儘管國際新聞提及雲端運算與AI軟體（Procore, Dynatrace）的利多，但台股外資對廣泛科技股的態度卻是謹慎甚至賣超。這暗示著資金並非全面看空科技，而是更為精準地篩選標的。力積電獲得高盛青睞，可能代表市場對特定記憶體或成熟製程的需求前景抱持樂觀，認為其相較於先進製程，更能抵禦潛在的市場波動。這場資金的「暴力聯結」，揭示了大戶在資訊不對稱下，對全球宏觀經濟趨勢的超前反應與精準佈局。
